'''N'ildwab''' was a rocky [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] with many canyons. The inhabitants of N'ildwab lived very simple lives. Because of this, in an effort to control the people, [[Nobam Nol]] terrorized the inhabitants and claimed to be a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. He was able to mimick [[The Force/Legends|Force]] powers because of his wired gloves. Because of his terrorism, the people of N'ildwab hired [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to kill Nol. Fett was successful.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
